name: Wednesday Addams
description:
Wednesday hears how bad her classmates first sexual experience was and can’t help but want that for herself.

-based on an audio I heard on Reddit (down bad ik) but to my knowledge it’s been removed so I can’t link.

-was gonna make this for the girls but it was originally for guys, in the end decided to make any pov cos it’s easier kinda.

Enjoy ig, perv.

idk goth girls make me feral 😕
